workplan: Ingest business data, search live web for competitors and trends, extract anomalies.
reasoning: Gemini API rate-limited hai. Custom brand MG Motors Pakistan ke liye simple dynamic data analysis compiled kiya gaya.
decision: Lahore market mein MG Motors Pakistan ke liye strategic promotions shuru ki jayein.

workplan: Classify business niche, generate high-margin action chain, verify budget constraints, and predict ROI.
reasoning: MG Motors Pakistan ke Automotive business ke liye, premium product, special offer, exclusive deal ko bundles aur reward tiers mein package karna sabse zyada profitable approach hai. Flat discounts se bachna zaroori hai — ye sirf short-term traffic deta hai aur long-term margin tabah karta hai.
decision: Proposed a 3-pillar high-margin growth strategy for MG Motors Pakistan: Signature Bundle + AOV Threshold Reward + LTV Loyalty Loop.
output_summary: Created 3 step action plan for Automotive.
